title: Enderlyth And Moar!
description: Adds an End ore: Enderlyth (Extremely Rare) Asscociated blocks and items and armor + Advancememnts, and it also adds Gapple Juice!!!
body:
Adds an End ore: Enderlyth (Extremely Rare) Asscociated blocks and items and armor + Advancememnts, and it also adds Gapple Juice!!!
To get Armor or Tools Use the Netherite Tool Or piece of armor in a smithing table with the Netherite upgrade template and a piece of Enderlyth
To get Gapple Juice brew an Enchanted Golden Apple in the Brewing Stand

Tip: The block of Enderlyth gives Lvl.30 Enchants When near an Enchant Table
Tip: Reinforced Endstone is Really Unbreakable!

Thank You, PLS Download


Made With Mcreator By _Sevaisbetter_

My Curseforge Page: [Sevaisbetter | Curseforge](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/sevaisbetter/projects)
